en: Okay, buddy boy, here it is.
ko: 좋아, 친구야. 네가 내 옷을 숨겼으니까

en: You hide my clothes, I'm wearing everything you own. Oh, my God!
ko: 나는 네 옷을 전부 입고 있어.

en: That is so not the opposite of taking somebody's underwear.
ko: 세상에, 그건 남의 속옷을 가져가는 것의 반대가 전혀 아니잖아.

en: Look at me. I'm Chandler.
ko: 나 좀 봐, 나는 챈들러야. 옷을 더 입을 수 있을까?

en: Could I be wearing any more clothes?
ko: 나 좀 봐, 나는 챈들러야. 옷을 더 입을 수 있을까?

en: Maybe if I wasn't going commando.
ko: 속옷을 입고 있었다면 더 입을 수 있었을지도 몰라.

en: Ooh!
Yeah. Whoo!
I'll tell you, it's hot with all this stuff on.
ko: 말해줄게, 이렇게 많이 입으니까 정말 덥다.

en: I, uh, I better not do any, I don't know, lunges.
ko: 아마 런지 같은 건 안 하는 게 좋겠어.

en: Okay, okay, enough. Enough with the lunging.
No, I'm sick of this, okay? I've had it up to here with you two.
ko: 나 이제 진짜 질렸어. 너희 둘 다 파티에 올 수 없어.

en: Neither of you can come to the party.
ko: 나 이제 진짜 질렸어. 너희 둘 다 파티에 올 수 없어.

en: Jeez, what a baby.
Yeah, Ross, way to ruin it. I was just gonna go get dressed.
ko: 그래, 로스, 분위기 다 망쳤네. 나 이제 옷 입으러 가려던 참이었는데.

en: All right, we still have a minute and a half left to go,
and we're down by two points, okay? Two points, ladies.
Phoebe, you do a button hook again. Rachel, you go long.
ko: 피비, 너 다시 버튼훅 해. 레이첼, 넌 길게 뛰어.

en: No, come on, don't make me go long.
ko: 아, 제발, 나한테 길게 뛰라고 하지 마.

en: Use me, they never cover me. Honey, there's a reason.
ko: 나를 써, 걔네가 날 안 막잖아. 자기야, 그럴 만한 이유가 있거든.

en: I'm sorry.
You know, Rachel, funny thing.
Actually, the end zone starts at that pole,
so you're five feet short, so... we win. Woo!
ko: 그러니까 5피트 모자라. 그래서... 우리가 이겼어. 우!

en: Wait, wait, wait, wait. So explain something to me, though.
ko: 잠깐, 잠깐, 잠깐. 근데 하나 설명해 봐.

en: If nobody tagged Rachel, then isn't the play still going? Wait.
ko: 아무도 레이첼을 태그 안 했으면, 플레이 아직 진행 중 아냐? 잠깐.

en: That was just the pants on the couch.
Um, hey, do you mind if I use your bathroom? Oh, go ahead. Thanks.
ko: 저기, 화장실 좀 써도 될까? 어, 그래. 고마워.

en: Oh, my God.
Oh.
Hey, my favorite part's coming up. Okay. Okay.
ko: 야, 내가 좋아하는 부분 나온다. 알겠어, 알겠어.

en: Oh, my God.
Hello?
Joey, it's Ross. I need some help.
ko: 조이, 나 로스야. 도움이 좀 필요해.

en: Uh, Chandler's not here. Well, you can help me. Okay.
ko: 어, 챈들러 없는데. 네가 도와줄 수 있어. 알겠어.

en: Listen, I'm in Elizabeth's bathroom. Nice.
ko: 들어봐, 나 엘리자베스 화장실에 있어. 좋은데.

en: No, I got really hot in my leather pants, so I took them off,
ko: 아니, 가죽 바지 입고 너무 더워서 벗었는데,

en: but they must have shrunk from the sweat or something,
or my legs expanded from the heat.
ko: 아니면 열 때문에 다리가 부은 건지.

en: But I can't get them back on, Joey. I can't.
ko: 근데 다시 못 입겠어, 조이. 안 돼.

en: Oh, that is quite a situation.
Uh, do you see any, like, powder?
Powder, yeah, yeah, I have powder. Good, good, okay. Sprinkle some of that on your legs. It'll absorb some of the moisture,
ko: 파우더, 그래, 있어. 좋아, 좋아. 다리에 좀 뿌려봐. 습기를 흡수해서,

en: and then you can get your pants back on. Yeah, hold on.
ko: 그러면 바지 다시 입을 수 있을 거야. 응, 잠깐.

en: They're not coming on, man.
Um, you see any, uh... Oh, Vaseline.
ko: 음, 혹시... 바셀린 같은 거 있어?

en: Oh, I...
I see lotion. I have lotion. Will that work?
ko: 로션 보인다. 로션 있어. 그거 되나?

en: Yeah, sure. Throw some of that on there.
Hold on.
Mm.
Uh...
Ah!
Oh!
Oh!
Oh!
Oh!
Ross, you okay?
There's still... there's still not coming on, man,
and the lotion and the powder have made a paste.
ko: 그리고 로션이랑 파우더가 섞여서 반죽이 됐어.

en: Really?
Uh, what color is it?
What difference does that make?
Well, I'm just... If the paste matches the pants,
ko: 아, 그냥... 반죽이 바지 색이랑 맞으면,

en: you can make yourself a pair of paste pants and she won't know the difference! Joey, do you have a minute?
ko: 반죽 바지를 만들면 모를 수도 있잖아! 조이, 잠깐 시간 돼?

en: Dude, what am I...
Uh, Rachel's here, so good luck, man. Let me know how it works out. Oh, Joey.
ko: 어, 레이첼 왔으니까, 행운을 빌어. 어떻게 됐는지 알려줘. 아, 조이.

en: I have such a problem.
Uh, well, your timing couldn't be better.
I am putting out fires all over the place today.
ko: 오늘 여기저기서 불 끄고 다니는 중이거든.

en: Come on, Charlie. Oh.
All right OK Here we go All right ready Turn Okay Turn Turn
ko: 좋아, 가자. 준비됐지? 돌려. 좋아, 돌려, 돌려.

en: I don't think we can turn anymore.
ko: 더 이상 못 돌릴 것 같은데.

en: I just don't think it's gonna fit. Oh, yeah, it will. Come on, up, up, up, up. Yes.
ko: 안 들어갈 것 같아. 아, 들어가, 들어가. 어서, 위로, 위로. 좋아.

en: Here we go. Pivot. Pivot. Pivot. Pivot.
Pivot!
Pivot!
Pivot!
Pivot!
Shut up! Shut up! Shut up!
Oh!
Okay, I don't think it's gonna pivot anymore.
ko: 좋아, 더 이상 피벗 안 될 것 같아.

en: You think?
All right, let's, uh, let's bring it back down and try again.
Okay.
Oh.
Okay, yeah, I think it's really stuck now.
I can't believe that didn't work. I know, me neither. I mean, you had a sketch.
ko: 그게 안 됐다니 믿을 수 없어. 나도, 그러니까. 그림까지 그렸잖아.

en: Oh, you know what? What did you mean when you said pivot? Hey, you guys. Hey. Is Monica here?
ko: 아, 있잖아. 피벗이라고 했을 때 무슨 뜻이었어? 야, 얘들아. 모니카 있어?

en: No. No.
All right, listen, I just bought something. I'm not sure she's gonna like it,
ko: 좋아, 들어봐, 방금 뭘 하나 샀는데. 모니카가 좋아할지 모르겠어.

en: and it's gonna seem a little crazy, but this is something I wanted, since I was a little girl. You bought Sean Cassidy.
ko: 좀 미친 것 같겠지만, 어렸을 때부터 갖고 싶었던 거야. 숀 캐시디 샀구나.

en: No, I wish. Okay, you ready? Yeah. Okay.
ko: 아니, 그러고 싶다. 준비됐어? 응. 좋아.

en: Check it out.
Oh, my God. What is... What the hell is that? It's a cat.
ko: 세상에. 뭐... 그게 도대체 뭐야? 고양이야.

en: That is not a cat. Yes, it is. Why is it inside out?
ko: 그건 고양이가 아니야. 맞아, 고양이야. 왜 뒤집어져 있어?

en: Excuse me, but this is a purebred, show-quality Sphinx cat.
ko: 실례지만, 이건 순종 쇼 품질 스핑크스 고양이야.

en: How much did you pay for that?
Well, it was a little extravagant, but I got a pretty good deal. How much? A thousand bucks.
ko: 좀 비쌌긴 한데, 꽤 좋은 가격에 샀어. 얼마? 천 달러.

en: On a cat? It's not a cat.
All right, listen, ball boys.
My grandmother had one of these when I was a little girl,
ko: 내가 어렸을 때 할머니가 이런 고양이를 키웠거든,

en: and it was the sweetest thing. I mean, it was so cute.
It would sit in my lap and just purr all day long,
and I would drag a shoestring on the ground, and it would chase it.
Free cats do that, too, you know. It's not a cat.
ko: 공짜 고양이도 그러거든. 그건 고양이가 아니야.

en: Uh, you guys, I'm really excited about this, okay? I don't care what you think.
ko: 야, 나 이거 진짜 기대되거든, 알겠어? 너네가 뭐라 하든 상관없어.

en: I'm gonna go set up a little litter box for Mrs. Whiskerson.
What am I gonna call her, Fluffy?
Danger! Danger!
What the hell was that?
A lesson in the importance of unagi.
You're a freak. Perhaps.
Now, I'm curious.
At what point during those girlish screams
ko: 그 여자 같은 비명을 지르는 도중

en: would you have begun to kick my ass?
All right so we weren prepared I sorry I had to take such drastic measures to make my point but I look I just want you guys to be safe
ko: 좋아, 우리가 준비가 안 되어 있었으니까. 이렇게 과격한 방법을 써서 미안하지만, 그냥 너희가 안전했으면 좋겠어.

en: Nagi
Ah, salmon skin roll.
All right.
This isn't so bad.
I like the flowery smell.
Which is okay, because I've got my boat.
So? Oh, my God.
I told you you were a bad person.
Hey, when you get out, maybe I can give you a facial. I'm gonna need a bigger boat.
ko: 야, 나오면 내가 페이셜 해줄까. 더 큰 보트가 필요할 것 같아.

en: So, how dark do you want to be?
We have one, two, or three.
Well, I like how you look. What are you? Puerto Rican. Two. I think a two.
ko: 음, 당신 피부색 좋은데요. 뭐예요? 푸에르토리코인이요. 2단계요. 2단계로 할게요.

en: You're gonna face the red light.
When the red light goes on, the spring's about to start, so close your eyes.
ko: 빨간 불이 켜지면 분사가 시작되니까 눈을 감으세요.

en: When the spraying stops, count to five.
Pat yourself down to avoid drip marks,
then turn around so we can get your back. Got it?
ko: 그다음 뒤돌아서 등 쪽도 해야 해요. 알겠죠?

en: Spray, count, pat, and turn.
Spray, count, and pat.
Wow, you catch on quick.
Well, I have a PhD, so...
One Mississippi, two Mississippi, three Mississippi...
ko: 하나 미시시피, 둘 미시시피, 셋 미시시피...

en: I'm not finished counting!
You sprayed my front twice! You never turned?
ko: 앞쪽을 두 번이나 뿌렸잖아! 안 돌았어요?

en: No, I barely even got to three Mississippi.
Mississippi? I said count to five. Mississippi-lessly?
ko: 미시시피? 다섯까지 세라고 했잖아요. 미시시피 없이?

en: Well, how bad is it?
Not that bad yet, but it keeps getting darker for the next four hours. So how dark is it gonna get?
ko: 아직 그렇게 심하진 않은데, 앞으로 4시간 동안 계속 어두워져요. 그럼 얼마나 어두워지는데요?

en: Oh, you gotta spray it with two twos and... I'm a four?
Yeah, but your back's a zero. You're gonna want to even that out. Really?
ko: 네, 근데 등은 0이에요. 맞추고 싶으실 텐데. 진짜요?

en: You might want to get back in there. Oh, okay.
ko: 다시 들어가시는 게 좋겠어요. 아, 알겠어요.

en: Wait a minute. There's no light on the back wall.
How do I know when it's going to start? Hello? Hello?
ko: 언제 시작되는지 어떻게 알아? 여보세요? 여보세요?

en: Oh, my eye!
Oh!
Oh!
Oh!
Oh!
Oh!
Oh!
Oh!
The same thing happened again!
You got two more twos?
I'm an eight!
